rides.title: April Morning Ride
rides.description: First ride of the month. An hour in the forest before the week begins.

rides.title: April Sunday Ride
rides.description: Lainzer Tiergarten loop. Rolling hills, mixed surface, no traffic.

rides.title: May Morning Ride
rides.description: Early May. The forest wakes up first.

rides.title: May Sunday Ride
rides.description: Route TBA. Details shared on Strava one week before.

rides.title: March Morning Ride
rides.description: First March ride. Cold start, dry trails.

rides.title: February Sunday Ride
rides.description: Mid-February loop through Lainzer Tiergarten. Mud season in full effect.

rides.title: February Morning Ride
rides.description: First ride back after January. Quiet trails, sharp air.
